sections.paragraph:
διχοστάτης, ου, ὁ (s. prec. two entries) one who causes dissensions (w. παράνομοι) Hs 8, 7, 6. S. DELG s.v. δί and ἵστημι.

prec. prec. = preceding

Hs Hs = Similitudes

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 253
